title: Invocation
description: Represents a Restate durable invocation — an in-flight or completed call to a service handler with exactly-once execution semantics.

target.description: The fully qualified target in format ServiceName/handlerName or ServiceName/key/handlerName.

target_service_name.description: The name of the target service.

target_handler_name.description: The name of the target handler.

target_service_key.description: The virtual object key (null for plain services).

status.description: Current execution status of the invocation.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the invocation was created.

modified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the invocation status last changed.

deployment_id.description: The deployment that is handling this invocation.

retry_count.description: Number of times this invocation has been retried.

last_failure.description: Description of the last failure that caused a retry.

next_retry_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the next retry will occur.
